data.title: Mirror Words
data.statement:
Given a string, reverse each word individually while keeping the word order unchanged. Words are separated by a single space.
Example:
hello world → olleh dlrow
data.constraints:
1 ≤ length(S) ≤ 10^5
S contains only lowercase letters (a-z) and spaces
No leading or trailing spaces
Words are separated by exactly one space
data.inputDescription: A single line containing a string S composed of words separated by spaces.
data.outputDescription: Print the transformed string where each word is reversed, but the order of words remains the same.

lastVersion.statementHTML:
Goal

Given a string, reverse each word individually while keeping the word order unchanged. Words are separated by a single space.
Example:
hello world → olleh dlrow
Input
A single line containing a string S composed of words separated by spaces.
Output
Print the transformed string where each word is reversed, but the order of words remains the same.
Constraints
1 ≤ length(S) ≤ 10^5
S contains only lowercase letters (a-z) and spaces
No leading or trailing spaces
Words are separated by exactly one space
Example
Input
hello world
Output
olleh dlrow
